challenge-01.title: Print Your First Message
challenge-01.description: Use print() to display the text 'Hello World'
challenge-01.starterCode:
# Write your print statement below:
print()
challenge-01.solution:
# Write your print statement below:
print('Hello World')

challenge-01.title: Python is a Language

challenge-01.starterCode:

challenge-01.solution:

print('Python')
